evals.prompt: What is my current balance on account ACC-001?
evals.expected_output: Agent calls get_balance for ACC-001 and reports the balance
expectations: get_balance was called with account ACC-001

evals.expected_output: Agent calls get_accounts and lists all accounts
Agent calls get_accounts first, then asks which account the user wants
expectations: get_accounts was called to retrieve account list
Response asks the user to specify or choose an account
